US Olympian says 'I would never say that' after White House AI video shows him insulting CanadaUSA men's ice hockey player Brady Tkachuk distances himself from an AI-enhanced White House video in which he appears to disparage Canadians, saying "those words would never come out of my mouth". https://www.bbc.com/sport/ice-hockey/articles/cqj9w4xz1l0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/ice-hockey/articles/cqj9w4xz1l0o#0 Fri, 27 Feb 2026 08:53:41 GMT
